name: The Fellowship of Infinity
short_description: Travel through mathematical structures in first-person, collecting runes to help uncover and unlock the hidden structures of the universe. Fractals, liminal spaces and encrypted messages are waiting for you.
detailed_description:
The Fellowship of Infinity is a first-person game involving complex geometry and mathematical puzzles. Experience the void, attain the infinite and observe the indescribable with cosmological symbology.
The main objective of this game is to obtain runes, which allow the player to decode hidden messages seen throughout the game. This progression requires levelling up (to a maximum level of 92), obtaining 3 keystones and solving puzzles. 
The secondary objective is to serve as a virtual library for writings made by the developer, Nicholas. These can be accessed from the library or the riemann sphere.
Please note: the level 'the lab' is a hidden, developer-only level and public access isn't intended. The final level for public players is 'the ledge'.
